image_prompt: Editorial hero image for a premium men's longevity brand. Near-black background (#0B0B0C), subtle warm bronze/gold accent lighting, abstract and conceptual representation of: Eternal Flow of Time. Minimal, sophisticated, cinematic, high-end magazine quality, masculine, scientific-but-warm mood. STRICT: no text, no words, no logos, no people, no faces, no medical imagery, no before/after, no pills shown as treatment, no clinical claims. Pure abstract/editorial art only.
